From: Dr Josef Karthauser <joe@tao.org.uk>

Subject: Re: kern/164531: [xen] [panic] Boot time crash using XEN HVM
enabled kernel.
To: Sergey Kandaurov <pluknet@gmail.com>


Yes, this works. The patch applied cleanly to 8.2, and the ethernet
device probes properly now. (Can we get this MFC'd to 8.2?)
